prompt: I want to add a new skill, like a repl skill similar to the ping one but this one should do like a health check on the worker pool. It should dispatch a simple query to each worker and report back latency and whether they responded. Put it next to the ping skill I guess. And make sure the skill registry picks it up automatically.

assertions.text: Identifies rlm_adk/skills/repl_skills/ping.py as the template to follow
Notes that WorkerPool is an alias for DispatchConfig in dispatch.py
Specifies creating the new file at rlm_adk/skills/repl_skills/ (next to ping.py)
Includes specific line numbers in an appendix or reference section
Mentions YAML frontmatter requirement for skill discovery
